title: Prijzen & condities.
desc: Bekijk direct uw persoonlijke prijzen en condities voor de meeste productgroepen in de webshop.

treatments.brief: A per-product-group price list: rows (Dekverf / Tuigerij / Filters) with 'uw prijs' and a green korting % badge.
A personal-vs-list price comparison for a product: lijstprijs (struck through) vs uw prijs, with the savings highlighted.
A staffel/volume-discount ladder: quantity tiers (1-9 / 10-49 / 50+) mapping to a per-stuk price that drops, as a stepped ladder.
A product card with the personal price highlighted: product image-placeholder + name + big 'uw prijs €X,XX' + small crossed list price.
A conditions/agreement summary: key terms (betaaltermijn 30 dagen, gratis levering > €500, vaste korting) as labeled rows.
